councilors.name: Scholar
councilors.reward:
Data-Lab Archives
Research data-lab locations pulled from Galactic Council archives. Boosts Research Storage by 7% for 40 hours.

councilors.name: Miner
councilors.reward:
Mineral Archives
Mineral storage locations pulled from Galactic Council archives. Boosts Mining Storage by 7% for 40 hours.

councilors.name: Star Charts
councilors.reward:
Star Chart Purger (8 - 20)
Removes the target planet from your scan database,
increasing your chances of scanning for new locations

councilors.name: Relics
councilors.reward:
Relic Archives
Artifact site locations pulled from Galactic Council archives. Boosts Artifact Storage by 7% for 40 hours.

councilors.name: Geneticist
councilors.reward:
Gene Archives
Genetic records pulled from Galactic Council archives. Boosts Evolution Gene yields by 7% for 40 hours.

councilors.name: Sensors
councilors.reward:
Observatory Archives
Observational records pulled from Galactic Council archives. Boosts Scanning by 3% for 40 hours.

councilors.name: Seismic
councilors.reward:
Consensus of Fire (Civicordium Seasonal Only)
Permanently increases the mining output of a Volcanic
or Demon planet by 2, up to a maximum of 30x Mega Rich.
Planet must have at least 5 distinct structures that provide at least +2 Influence.

councilors.name: Attache
councilors.reward:
Civicordium Platform (Civicordium Seasonal Only)
[ Planet Structure - Size:1, Influence:1, Influence:+2% ]
Planet must have 2+ distinct structures that provide at least +2 influence.
Can be upgraded with 4+ other structures
Limit 1

councilors.name: Warden
councilors.reward:
Energy Cube
Fully recharges energy when used

councilors.name: Chrono
councilors.reward:
Aeon Chronoprism (1 - 3)
A delicate device made from entangled Time Crystals...
Resets the timer on a daily mission at random

councilors.name: Keymaster
councilors.reward:
Labyrinth Sigil
Starts a new Daily Challenge

councilors.name: Uplift
councilors.reward:
Terraforming Device
Permanently increases the mining, research, and artifact availability of a planet

councilors.name: Minister
councilors.reward:
Civicordium Charter (Civicordium Seasonal Only)
Establishes a diplomatic center in desolate regions.
Charters a Small (or smaller) planet, expanding influence by 1,
up to a maximum of Rich.
Can only be used on planets with no other resource Rich or greater

councilors.name: Envoy
councilors.reward:
Hall of Delegates
[ Planet Structure - Size:1, Artifact:1, Research:3 ]
If built on a planet that already has a 'Council Chamber' or 'Court of Oracles' constructed,
this structure gains +2 Influence. Limit 1 per planet.

councilors.name: Mining
councilors.reward:
Toxic Purifier (2 - 5)
Permanently increases the mining output of a Toxic or Irradiated planet by 2.

councilors.name: Archivist
councilors.reward:
Gallery of Records
(Missing description - Size 1, Artifact 2, Influence 1, Influence Storage 180, Artifact Storage 1800, planet must be Small or smaller)

councilors.name: Advisor
councilors.reward:
Consular Sigil
(Missing description - Refreshes the timer for your 'Daily Reward' and 'Supporter Bonus'

councilors.name: Chancery
councilors.reward:
Chancery Quarter
(Missing description - ''A special political zone for isolated regions.'' Permanently increases the target planet size by 2%. Can only be used on 'Very Small' (or smaller) planets that have Influence availability.)

councilors.name: Senator
councilors.reward:
Forum of Realms
[ Planet Structure - Size:1, Artifact:2, Mining:2, Research:2, Influence:1 ]
Planet must be Small size or smaller.
Boosts all production by 2%.
Limit 1 per planet

councilors.name: Theorist
councilors.reward:
Quasi-Spacial Isolator
(Missing description - Creates an intense spacial distortion field around an
Average or smaller planet, expanding its size by 1.)

councilors.name: Magistrate
councilors.reward:
Court of Eternity
[ Planet Structure - Size:1, Influence:2 ]
Boosts all production by 5%.
Planet must be 'Very Small' size or smaller.
Limit 1 per planet
